headline: CSX to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing Amid Cost Pressures?
summary: CSX faces muted Q1 expectations as weak demand, high costs and service issues are likely to have weighed on revenues ahead of its April 22 earnings release.

raw.headline: CSX to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing Amid Cost Pressures?
raw.summary: CSX faces muted Q1 expectations as weak demand, high costs and service issues are likely to have weighed on revenues ahead of its April 22 earnings release.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CSX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: CSX has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 14.9%. The stock now trades at $42.45, marking a 17.5% gain. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
